prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-SPACE-ENFORCER-SILVER Product Type: TOY_GUN Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: Space Enforcer Toy Gun Blaster with Vibrant Spinning Lights and Sound Description: Defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, your little one is busy fighting evil galactic villains-after dinner and homework of course-and so, to ensure they're prepared and to keep their imaginative storytelling pretend play running at top speed, they'll need the latest KidFun Space Soldier Toy Gun Galaxy Blaster with colorful spinning lights and fast-paced super sonic sound effects to ensure victory and a safe journey home.

Made from durable plastic construction to withstand hours of pretend play, the toy gun space soldier galaxy blaster is lightweight, featuring bright lights and cool blasting sound effects to add all the thrill to their latest mission. The space soldier toy gun also features a detachable magazine that rotates and flashes bright, multicolored LED lights, for even more intergalactic fighting fun. And, let's not forget about the fast-action trigger (this is where the magic happens); upon release of the fast-acting trigger, the space soldier toy gun sets off an awesome display of colorful, spinning bright lights, followed by very cool sonic blasting firing sounds that make saving the galaxy even more fun. The toy gun comes WITH batteries included, so the superhero action can start right out of the box.

A great toy to get your kids off the couch and off tablets, cell phones, computers, laptops and more, the space blaster toy gun is action packed, boasting some seriously cool pretend play fighting features that will have kids up on their feet in search of the next intergalactic battle. And, whether its an alien invasion or a space mission to a galaxy far, far away, girls and boys alike will have a blast indoors or outside with these fun, colorful, spinning LED lights and sounds toy space blaster guns.

BATTERIES INCLUDED: Yes

WARNING: Choking Hazard (small parts)

AGE: 3+ Search Terms: boys toy guns toy space blaster galaxy toys super hero kids laser for costumes stocking stuffers action figure pretend play gifts for boys christmas Features: - ULTIMATE SPACE SOLDIERS GEAR: Defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, your little boys and girls are busy fighting evil galactic villains-after dinner and homework of course-and so, to ensure they're prepared and to keep their imaginative storytelling pretend play running at top speed, they'll need the latest KidFun Space Soldier Toy Gun Galaxy Blaster with colorful spinning lights and fast-paced super sonic sound effects to ensure victory and a safe journey home! - HIGH QUALITY SOUNDS & LIGHTS: Made from durable plastic construction to withstand hours of pretend play, the toy gun space soldier galaxy blaster is lightweight, featuring bright lights and cool blasting sound effects to add all the thrill to their latest mission; the toy gun also features a detachable magazine that rotates and flashes bright, multicolored LED lights, for even more intergalactic fighting fun - FAST-ACTION TOY BLASTER : This is where the fun begins! Upon release of the fast-acting trigger, the space soldier toy gun starts an awesome display of colorful, spinning bright lights, then followed by very cool sonic blasting firing sounds, that make saving the galaxy even more fun; the toy gun comes WITH batteries included, so the superhero action can start right out of the box! - SCREEN-FREE FUN: A great toy to get your kids off the couch and off tablets, cell phones, computers, laptops and more; the space soldier galaxy blaster toy gun is action packed, boasting some seriously cool pretend play fighting features that will have kids up on their feet in search of the next battle; and, whether its an alien invasion or a space mission to a galaxy far, far away, kids will have a blast indoors or outside with these fun light and sounds toy space blaster guns - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 9 inches in length; Material: Plastic; Colors: Silver or Blue; Batteries: Included; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Age: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
